name: bandit.all_light_source_live_adapter_mcw
status: WIP scenario / current run blocks on post-wait saved horde persistence
description: Slice 5 all-light-source live adapter WIP proof route: load the staged all-light fixture, audit saved fire/smoke/furniture/portable-item/household-item light and staged horde footing, run a bounded in-game wait through the real wait UI, require same-run live signal logs for smoke plus multiple light packets, save, then inspect weather metadata and horde tracking movement/persistence. Current evidence proves the lamp/household/fire/smoke/weather live signal route but still blocks on the final saved horde persistence audit; it does not claim full Slice 5 closure, a normal player-created lamp deployment path, or a tile-perfect overmap light engine.

steps.label: all_light_source_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: loaded McWilliams gameplay screen from the all-light staged fixture; startup/load is footing only before saved metadata, live wait artifacts, save/writeback, weather audit, and horde metadata prove the slice

steps.label: audit_saved_all_light_source_footing_before_wait
steps.abort_reason: saved map metadata did not contain the staged fd_fire/fd_smoke/f_exodii_lamp/torch_lit/smart_lamp_on source mix before the bounded live wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-save metadata contains separate fire, smoke, furniture-light, portable torch-light, and household smart-lamp sources before any live signal credit

steps.label: audit_saved_weather_before_all_light_wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved dimension weather metadata is recorded before the live wait so the log weather/source interpretation can be compared to actual saved clear weather state

steps.label: audit_saved_turn_before_all_light_wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved player turn baseline is recorded before the bounded all-light live wait

steps.label: audit_saved_horde_before_all_light_wait
steps.abort_reason: saved overmap horde_map metadata did not contain the idle staged mon_zombie horde before the bounded live wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-save overmap metadata contains the staged idle horde before the light/smoke signal has a chance to retarget it

steps.label: wait_5_minutes_for_all_light_source_signals
steps.abort_reason: bounded 5-minute wait was interrupted or left a prompt visible; do not credit all-light live proof without completed in-game elapsed-time footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: the real wait UI is opened from loaded gameplay, Wait a while is chosen, 5 minutes elapse, and same-run debug artifacts show smoke plus four live light packets with weather/source logging and horde signal pressure

steps.label: audit_all_light_source_signal_artifacts
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not contain the all-light/smoke live signal scan plus horde-light signal lines after the bounded wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact contains live smoke plus four non-fire/fire light packets, raw weather/light-weather logging, and horde light-signal current-source metadata

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_all_light_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after the all-light wait and before guarded save/writeback

steps.label: request_direct_save_after_all_light_wait
steps.abort_reason: after requesting a save following the bounded all-light wait, OCR did not show the save-and-quit prompt before uppercase-Y confirmation
steps.expected_visible_fact: Save command is requested after the bounded all-light wait; mtime proves acceptance after confirmation

steps.label: confirm_direct_save_after_all_light_wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: uppercase Y confirms the recorded save prompt; following mtime/state gates prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_all_light_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the post-wait all-light save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed post-wait save, proving the following turn/weather/horde metadata reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_turn_after_all_light_wait
steps.abort_reason: saved player turn counter did not advance by at least 250 turns after the bounded wait and guarded save
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved player turn counter advanced by a bounded 5-minute-scale delta after the real wait UI path

steps.label: audit_saved_weather_after_all_light_wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved dimension clear-weather metadata is readable after the all-light wait/save and can be compared with the raw_weather/light_weather values logged by the live adapter

steps.label: audit_saved_horde_after_all_light_signal_wait
steps.abort_reason: saved overmap horde_map metadata did not show the staged horde gaining movement budget after the all-light live horde signal
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved overmap horde_map metadata shows the staged mon_zombie horde changed from idle baseline after live all-light horde signaling; destination/tracking fields are preserved in the metadata artifact for review

proof_contract.claim: WIP route for proving the Slice 5 live loaded-map adapter observes staged fire, smoke, furniture light, portable item light, and household smart-lamp light, logs weather/source interpretation, and delivers viable exposed light pressure before inspecting saved horde tracking/persistence through a bounded real wait path
proof_contract.current_wip_blocker: run .userdata/dev-harness/harness_runs/20260504_083003 reached green source/weather/wait/save gates and logged smoke_packets=1 plus light_packets=4, but the final saved horde audit found the staged mon_zombie horde absent instead of moved/persisted
proof_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for all-light-source live adapter response
proof_contract.failure_rule: No full Slice 5 live proof credit if source metadata, live wait, same-run signal artifacts, save/writeback, weather audit, turn delta, or saved horde movement/persistence metadata is missing or non-green.
